front.title: Use of the SLH-DSA Signature Algorithm in the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS)
front.workgroup: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME

abstract.t: SLH-DSA is a stateless hash-based signature algorithm. This document specifies the conventions for using the SLH-DSA signature algorithm with the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS). In addition, the algorithm identifier and public key syntax are provided.
